---
title: "What Babies Hear When You Sing to Them"
description: "I did find myself a newborn impromptu songwriter/singer ever since I became a parent."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-09-05"
categories: [personal, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![What Babies Hear When You Sing to Them. Image from [The Atlantic](https://www.theatlantic.com/family/archive/2022/09/benefits-of-singing-to-babies/671324/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

I did find myself a newborn impromptu songwriter/singer ever since I became a parent. :-)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_what-babies-hear-when-you-sing-to-them-activity-6972579981780533248-kbFH).*
